betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Covered Cable§f

§aClean, opaque 8-channel cable.§f

The §bME Covered Cable§f carries §e8 channels§f like glass cable but with an opaque, non-transparent appearance. Available in §e16 colors§f.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e8§f
§b•§f Appearance: opaque, no internal glow
§b•§f Available in all 16 AE2 cable colors
§b•§f Fluix-colored covered cable (meta 36) is the default

§6When To Use§f:
Functionally identical to glass cable. Use covered cables for cleaner builds where you do not need to see §bchannel indicators§f. Common uses:
§b•§f Aesthetic builds (no visible cable internals)
§b•§f Conduits inside walls or behind blocks
§b•§f Production lines where cable appearance matters

§6Upgradeable§f:
Covered cable can be upgraded to:
§b•§f §bDense Covered Cable§f (32 channels, 4× throughput)
§b•§f Drop a §bDense Cover§f on a covered cable segment

§eTip§f: Use §bSmart Cable§f when debugging networks; use §bCovered Cable§f for finished builds.
